summary: Implemented AI-powered summary generation for What's New findings. Added generateFindingSummary() function to convex/whatsNew/llm.ts that generates 2-3 line summaries (80-150 characters) using LLM. Integrated into daily report synthesis flow in convex/whatsNew/actions.ts to process top 20 findings lacking summaries. Function handles failures gracefully by returning undefined and logging errors without blocking report generation. All 5 acceptance criteria verified with integration tests.
acceptance_criteria_verified: AC-1: Each finding has summary field (80-150 chars)
AC-2: Summary captures key insight accurately
AC-3: Graceful failure handling (returns undefined, not error)
AC-4: Truncate long summaries to 150 chars with ellipsis
files_modified: convex/whatsNew/actions.ts (integrated summary generation into synthesis flow)

implementation_details.error_handling: Returns undefined on failure, logs error
